$comment: Admitted at M3 (T-102) by ADR-0021 per the ADR-0019 item-4 criteria: schema_version required; operation/execution identity on receipts; transport_outcome/failure_kind conditionally tied (RFC-002 §2.2 CHECK mirrored as if/then). Enums generated from RFC-002 §3/§10 via detent.statetable (tests/schemas/test_enum_sync.py). $id host is a placeholder pending the name screen. Shape changes require an ADR.
title: Dispatch receipt
description: One attempt's evidence: what was sent under which idempotency key and how the transport ended. TIMEOUT and LOST imply AMBIGUOUS until reconciled; unknown destination errors are AMBIGUOUS, never FAILED (RFC-002 §10).

receipt_id.$comment: Prefix pinned; suffix encoding is an implementation choice (zero-padded ledger id in the first slice).

operation_id.description: Execution identity (ADR-0019 admission criterion): attempts are unambiguous across executions.

declaration_digest.description: Declaration version used for this attempt (C1 M17).

idempotency_key.description: Derived ONLY from operation_id (master doc §7.2; conformance-tested at M3).

destination_ref.description: Destination-assigned reference when a response carried one. Absent ≠ null (JCS discipline).

allOf.$comment: Mirror of the ledger CHECK: (transport_outcome = FAILED) = (failure_kind IS NOT NULL).
